features.name: Neo4j schema DDL (constraints, indexes, nodes, edges, traversals, v1.2 seeds)
PostgreSQL + TimescaleDB schema (configuration_settings, projections)
TypeScript type system (all enums, interfaces, error types)
Docker Compose infrastructure (Neo4j, TimescaleDB, Kafka)
Database drivers and Kafka client library layer
Cross-store saga coordinator with compensating rollback
GL projector (Kafka → TimescaleDB gl_period_balances)
ConfigurationService with 4-level cascade resolution
Journal posting service (double-entry, period check, fund_id, 4-step saga)
Graph CRUD service (Entity, Outcome, Activity, Period, Fund, edges)
REST API routes (graph, GL, config)
All 11 invariant test files (GL, Graph, Ontology, Equity)
Init scripts (neo4j-init, pg-migrate, seed)
Live database verification (run init scripts, verify connectivity, seed data)
All 11 invariants pass against live databases
Saga rollback verification on simulated failure
Neo4j deny UPDATE/DELETE on JournalEntry and LedgerLine
Full graph node CRUD (Resource, Project, Initiative, Metric, Capability, Asset, etc.)
Edge management (CONTRIBUTES_TO functions, DEPENDS_ON, DELEGATES_TO)
Ontology validation on Outcome creation and edge paths
Fund accounting: fund_id on LedgerLine, fund CRUD for NFP entities
GL core: AccountingPeriod lifecycle, StatutoryMapping, P&L, balance sheet
Social constraints (PROHIBITS pre-filter), obligations, alerts
Admin UI: entity settings, approval thresholds, fund management
Accruals engine: TemporalClaim, recognition, auto-reversal, ECL
Fixed assets + two-pass depreciation (accounting + tax CCA/MACRS)
Lease accounting: RightOfUseAsset, LeaseLiability, operating lease for ASPE
Provision CRUD with IAS 37 recognition criteria
Related party framework: transactions, arm's length, disclosures
Consolidation: intercompany matching, FX translation, goodwill
Equity close: RetainedEarnings, OCI components, recycling, EquitySection
AI weight learner with ontology-aware back-propagation
Epistemic priority scorer (EVOI computation)
Cashflow optimizer (FloatWindow scoring, AR discount vs facility)
Scenario engine (Monte Carlo on distal/force majeure nodes)
Claude AI assistant (natural language → graph traversal)
Tax engine core: DeferredTax, TaxProvision, current tax
Tax modules: CRA Corp, GST/HST, IRS Corp, CRA Charity, IRS Exempt, state tax, withholding
Tax credit management: identification, computation, carryforward, filing
Compliance: approval workflows, document hashing, access audit
IFRS 15 revenue recognition (contracts, performance obligations)
Inventory accounting (FIFO/WA/LIFO, NRV testing)
Equity expansion: ShareClass, EquityAward, EPS computation
XBRL tagging on StatutoryMapping
Bank reconciliation service
